events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex, United Kingdom.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! His distinctive sound and incredible solos have inspired generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent, England.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! The Rolling Stones legend continues to define rock and roll.

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV, the first 24-hour music video channel, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its inaugural broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape. And what was the very first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – the irony is still brilliant.

events.title: Oasis - Definitely Maybe released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, by Creation Records.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped their seminal debut, 'Definitely Maybe'. A true Britpop masterpiece that still sounds as fresh today.

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, on Max Yasgur's dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A legendary moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death (1977)
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music continues to inspire.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death (1996)
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a hugely influential rapper, was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away 30 years ago. His voice and message live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death (1970)
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, died on September 18, 1970, in London at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us too soon 56 years ago. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles - Abbey Road released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! An icon of rock and a true original.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that undeniable rock and roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon - Imagine released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and the album of the same name was released on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and unity that resonates as strongly today as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. It completely changed how we listen to music, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating the iconic British spy and his incredible cinematic legacy. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, England, and passed away in 1980.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire millions.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon.
